note: Curated Amazon track (interim until PA-API access). Records here are researched editorially: ASIN + our own copy + a price BAND (never a scraped live price), no Amazon imagery. import-amazon-watchlist.mjs converts entries to graph products with merchant 'amazon'. When PA-API lands, the sync job replaces priceBand with live price and adds official images by ASIN — records need no other change.
